title: RNA Isolation from Plant Tissue Using pBIOZOL-LiCl Method
author: Unknown
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.4rvgv66

steps.title: Grind tissue to a powder in liquid nitrogen
steps.instruction: Grind tissue to a powder in liquid nitrogen.

steps.title: Add 1
steps.instruction: Add 1.3 mL of cold ( 4 °C ) pBIOZOL reagent for up to 100 mg gram of frozen, ground tissue.

steps.title: Incubate the tube for 00:05:00 at Room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate the tube for 00:05:00 at Room temperature . Lay the tube down horizontally to maximize surface area during RNA extraction.

steps.title: Centrifuge at for 00:02:00
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at for 00:02:00 .

steps.title: Transfer the supernatant to a new 1
steps.instruction: Transfer the supernatant to a new 1.5 ml RNase-free tube.

steps.title: Add 50 µL of 2 Molarity (M) NaAc (pH 4
steps.instruction: Add 50 µL of 2 Molarity (M) NaAc (pH 4.2) to the extract.

steps.title: Centrifuge the mixture at 4 °C...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the mixture at 4 °C for 00:10:00 at to separate the phases.

steps.title: Add to the aqueous phase 1/3...
steps.instruction: Add to the aqueous phase 1/3 volume of 10 Molarity (M) LiCl.

steps.title: Centrifuge the mixture at 4 °C for 00:20:00 at >
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the mixture at 4 °C for 00:20:00 at > .

steps.title: Decant the supernatant, taking care not to lose the pellet
steps.instruction: Decant the supernatant, taking care not to lose the pellet.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 4 °C for 00:03:00 at >
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 4 °C for 00:03:00 at > .

steps.title: Repeat the previous two steps
steps.instruction: Repeat the previous two steps.

steps.title: Add 50 µL RNase-free water to dissolve the RNA pellet
steps.instruction: Add 50 µL RNase-free water to dissolve the RNA pellet.

steps.title: Add SSTE buffer to RNA to...
steps.instruction: Add SSTE buffer to RNA to a total volume of 600 µL .

steps.title: Vortex the tube until the phases mix and appears cloudy
steps.instruction: Vortex the tube until the phases mix and appears cloudy.

steps.title: Centrifuge at for 00:10:00 in a microcentrifuge
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at for 00:10:00 in a microcentrifuge.

steps.title: Transfer the top, aqueous phase to a new 1
steps.instruction: Transfer the top, aqueous phase to a new 1.5 ml RNase-free tube.

steps.title: Vortex the tube until the phases mix and appear cloudy
steps.instruction: Vortex the tube until the phases mix and appear cloudy.

steps.title: Centrifuge at for 00:10:00
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at for 00:10:00 .

steps.title: Transfer the top aqueous phase to a new 1
steps.instruction: Transfer the top aqueous phase to a new 1.5 ml RNase-free tube.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 4 °C for 00:20:00 at >
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 4 °C for 00:20:00 at > .

steps.title: Add 1 mL of 75 % ethanol to the pellet
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL of 75 % ethanol to the pellet.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 4 °C for 00:05:00 at
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 4 °C for 00:05:00 at .

steps.title: Repeat step 18 and 19
steps.instruction: Repeat step 18 and 19.

steps.title: Open cap and air-dry the pellet no more than 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Open cap and air-dry the pellet no more than 00:05:00 .

steps.title: Add 30 µL RNase-free water to dissolve the pellet
steps.instruction: Add 30 µL RNase-free water to dissolve the pellet.

steps.title: Before library construction, treat RNA with DNase I
steps.instruction: Before library construction, treat RNA with DNase I.

steps.title: Mix by briefly vortexing or flicking...
steps.instruction: Mix by briefly vortexing or flicking the bottom of the tube until the sample is thoroughly suspended.

steps.title: Tap tube to mix
steps.instruction: Tap tube to mix.

steps.title: Then add 100 µL 5 Molarity...
steps.instruction: Then add 100 µL 5 Molarity (M) NaCl and 300 µL chloroform.

steps.title: Vortex vigorously
steps.instruction: Vortex vigorously.

steps.title: Transfer the top aqueous phase (about...
steps.instruction: Transfer the top aqueous phase (about 400 µL – 500 µL ) to a new 1.5 ml RNase-free tube.

steps.title: Mix and let stand at 4 °C overnight
steps.instruction: Mix and let stand at 4 °C overnight.

steps.title: Add 1 mL of 75 % ethanol to the pellet
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL of 75 % ethanol to the pellet.

steps.title: Stand the tube at Room temperature for 00:03:00
steps.instruction: Stand the tube at Room temperature for 00:03:00 . Pellet may be difficult to see.

steps.title: Decant the liquid carefully, taking care...
steps.instruction: Decant the liquid carefully, taking care not to lose the pellet.

steps.title: Briefly centrifuge to collect the residual...
steps.instruction: Briefly centrifuge to collect the residual liquid and remove it with a pipette.

steps.title: Pipette the water up and down...
steps.instruction: Pipette the water up and down over the pellet to dissolve the RNA. If you extract more than 100 mg plant tissues, combine different extractions to one tube. .

steps.title: Then add equal volume of 25:24:1...
steps.instruction: Then add equal volume of 25:24:1 acid phenol:chloroform:isoamyl alcohol to the tube.

steps.title: Then incubate at 20 °C for 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Then incubate at 20 °C for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: Add equal volume of 24:1 chloroform:isoamyl alcohol to the tube
steps.instruction: Add equal volume of 24:1 chloroform:isoamyl alcohol to the tube.

steps.title: Then incubate at 20 °C for 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Then incubate at 20 °C for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: Add to the aqueous phase 2...
steps.instruction: Add to the aqueous phase 2 volumes of 100 % ethanol, 1/10 volume of 3 Molarity (M) NaAc (pH 5.2) and 2 µL 5 mg/ml glycogen.

steps.title: Invert tube to mix
steps.instruction: Invert tube to mix.

steps.title: Store at -20 °C for 02:00:00
steps.instruction: Store at -20 °C for 02:00:00 .

steps.title: Decant the supernatant carefully to avoid losing the pellet
steps.instruction: Decant the supernatant carefully to avoid losing the pellet.

steps.title: Incubate at 20 °C for 00:03:00
steps.instruction: Incubate at 20 °C for 00:03:00 .

steps.title: Decant the liquid carefully, taking care...
steps.instruction: Decant the liquid carefully, taking care not to lose the pellet.

steps.title: Briefly centrifuge to collect the residual...
steps.instruction: Briefly centrifuge to collect the residual liquid and remove it with a pipette.
